purpose.laymen: Fail-closed go/no-go. Must be fully green (no warnings) before Monday ops.
purpose.technical: Runs scripts/ops/worldclass_preflight.sh and requires FAIL=0 WARN=0.

how_to_fix.laymen: Fix the first warning and rerun until it is fully green.
how_to_fix.technical: Run: bash scripts/ops/worldclass_preflight.sh. Resolve any WARN lines; WARN must be 0.

purpose.laymen: Proves transcript storage is real: at least one transcript row has a non-empty recording URL.
purpose.technical: Queries call_transcripts for recording_url not null and requires at least one row.

how_to_fix.laymen: Run transcript sync/backfill so recordings get stored.

purpose.laymen: Ensures Eve's core rules are one canonical source of truth (changes propagate everywhere).
purpose.technical: Verifies openclaw_workspace_template policy files remain symlinks to the canonical workspace state.

how_to_fix.laymen: Re-link the policy files back to the canonical workspace.
how_to_fix.technical: Run scripts/verify_policy_symlinks.sh and fix any non-symlink policy files in openclaw_workspace_template/.

purpose.laymen: Prevents machine-specific paths from breaking deployments and sharing.
purpose.technical: Scans tracked files for /Users/, /home/, or C:\\Users\\ to avoid host-leaking paths.

how_to_fix.laymen: Replace personal paths with relative paths or environment variables.
how_to_fix.technical: Replace offending paths with repo-relative paths or env vars; re-run scripts/scan_absolute_paths.sh.

purpose.laymen: Ensures Eve knows where its brain and memory live (state dir, queue path, config path).

how_to_fix.laymen: Set the missing settings so Eve can run.
how_to_fix.technical: Inspect the JSON report and resolve warnings (missing state dir, missing queue path, missing config).

purpose.laymen: Protects secrets: workflows must not contain real passwords/tokens in plain text.
purpose.technical: Scans workflows_n8n/*.json Config nodes for sensitive keys and requires env/vars expressions (={{$env.*}} or ={{$vars.*}}).

how_to_fix.laymen: Move secrets to env/vars bindings and remove any real tokens from workflow JSON.
how_to_fix.technical: Patch workflows: python3 scripts/patch_workflow_env_bindings.py --mode env (or --mode vars). Ensure n8n provides the env/vars at runtime. Literal tokens in workflow JSON are forbidden.

purpose.laymen: Runs Eve's safety contracts so changes do not silently break the system.

how_to_fix.laymen: Open the failing contract and fix the broken rule.
how_to_fix.technical: Run scripts/acceptance/run_contract_suite.sh and fix failing tests under tests/contracts/.

purpose.laymen: Quick pass/fail: are the core gates green before you run real commands?

how_to_fix.laymen: Open the failing gate output and fix what it says is broken.

purpose.laymen: Checks the production-critical constraints without the slow docker-heavy steps.

how_to_fix.laymen: Fix the first failing gate; rerun until green.

purpose.laymen: Slow but high confidence: proves the docker-backed integrations can run.

how_to_fix.laymen: Start Docker, then fix failing gates until all pass.

purpose.laymen: Proves the system is operationally safe to run (integrity, security hygiene, ingestion, revenue ops).
purpose.technical: Runs scripts/acceptance/run_acceptance.py for AT-PRO-004, AT-REV-001, AT-ING-001, AT-LEDGER-001, AT-SEC-002.

how_to_fix.laymen: Fix the first failing safety gate and rerun.

purpose.laymen: Checks whether Eve is running on this machine.
purpose.technical: Uses launchctl list to see if ai.openclaw.eve is loaded.

how_to_fix.laymen: Reinstall or restart the Eve service.
how_to_fix.technical: Use scripts/install_elijah_evebot_launchd.sh or launchctl bootstrap/kickstart the agent.
